lifenavigator.note: $135k liquid is correct sum of $95k+$40k; no invented figures.

justification: ChatGPT and LifeNavigator both correctly identify the liquidity drain (~$124k upfront leaves little reserve); Claude undercuts its own trust with a materially wrong $70k-reserve claim that makes the purchase look safer than it is.
